full_text:
**Experimental Plan**

Experiment: Dissociation protocol optimization (\***Insert sample ID
here**\*)

Objective: Optimize the dissociation protocol to isolate more
fibroblasts from ovarian tumors.

Approaches:

1\. \*Using collagenase & hyaluronidase\*:

- Condition 1: 20 min 0.125 % trypsin and 1 hour C&H

- Condition 2: 20 min 0.125 % trypsin and 2 hours C&H

- Condition 3: 20 min 0.125 % trypsin, 1 hour C&H, followed by brief
 > 0.125% trypsin of the cell pellet

- Condition 4: 20 min 0.125 % trypsin, 2 hours C&H, followed by brief
 > 0.125% trypsin of the cell pellet

2\. \*Using dispase followed by collagenase & hyaluronidase\*:

- Condition 5: Dispase for 30 min, followed by C&H for 30 min

- Condition 6: Dispase for 30 min, followed by C&H for 1 hour

Experimental Steps:

1\. \*Sample Preparation\*:

- Collect ovarian tumor samples and wash the larger tumor pieces by
 > placing them into a 50 ml Falcon tube, pouring sterile HBSS on
 > top, and gently inverting the tube several times.

- Mince the tumor piece into small pieces using sterile scalpel and
 > scissors; very small pieces for C&H dissociation and bigger but
 > still small pieces for dispase dissociation.

- Divide the minced tissue into six equal parts for each condition.

2\. \*Dissociation Protocols\*:

\*Collagenase & hyaluronidase-only conditions\*:

for dispase dissociation.

- Divide the minced tissue into six equal parts for each condition.

2\. \*Dissociation Protocols\*:

\*Collagenase & hyaluronidase-only conditions\*:

- Treat tissue slices with 0.125 % trypsin for 20 min in +37°C water
 > bath.

 - 0.125 % trypsin solution: 10 ml DPBS (without MgCl2 and CaCl2) +
 > 10 ml 0.25% trypsin EDTA

 - Gently invert the tubes a few times after 10 min and at the end
 > of the incubation period.

- After incubation, take the tissue pieces out and place them into two
 > cell culture dishes for mincing. To the two cell suspension, add
 > 20 ml DMEM/F12+++ media each, centrifuge 300 g 5 min RT, and
 > resuspend both tubes in 1 ml. Pool the cell suspension together

- Mince the sliced tissue pieces into tiny pieces, and divide the
 > contents of the two plates into two 50 ml Falcon tubes each.

- Treat samples with collagenase for the specified durations, make
 > sure to vortex briefly (approx. 30 seconds) before starting the
 > incubation (at +37°C rotating). Vortex also after incubation
 > before filtering.

 - collagenase dissociation media: 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 1 ml
 > C&H (10x stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

- Filter the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions: 70 µm cell
 > strainer

 - Pre-wet the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transfer the digested

ck) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

- Filter the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions: 70 µm cell
 > strainer

 - Pre-wet the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transfer the digested
 > suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, wash
 > the stainer with 5 ml media, and discard the leftover tissue
 > pieces.

 - Centrifuge the cell suspension 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C

- Do the RBC lysis: 2-4 ml depending on the pellet size, incubate 5
 > min RT, add 10-20 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuge

- For conditions with trypsin, add 0.125% trypsin and incubate briefly
 > (approx. 30 seconds).

 - trypsin media: 1 ml PBS + 1 ml trypsin (0.25 % stock)

 - After that, dilute the trypsin with fresh DMEM/F12 media and
 > centrifuge.

- For the conditions without trypsin, just add DMEM/F12 media.

- Resuspent in DMEM/F12 media, count the cells and prepare the
 > aliquots for flow cytometry.

\*Dispase followed by collagenase conditions\*:

- Treat samples with dispase for 30 minutes (at +37°C rotating),
 > vortex briefly (approx. 30 seconds) before starting the
 > incubation. Vortex also after incubation before filtering.

 - dispase dissociation media: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ + 200 µl dispase
 > 50 (U/ml stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

- Filter the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions. **Keep the
 > tissue leftovers.**

dia: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ + 200 µl dispase
 > 50 (U/ml stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

- Filter the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions. **Keep the
 > tissue leftovers.**

- Further dissociate the leftover tissue with collagenase &
 > hyaluronidase for specified durations.

 - collagenase dissociation media: 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 1 ml
 > C&H (10x stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

- Filter the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions

- Do the RBC lysis: 2-4 ml depending on the pellet size, incubate 5
 > min RT, add 10-20 ml cold DMEM/F12media.

- Count the cells and prepare the aliquots for flow cytometry.

3\. \*Flow Cytometry\*:

Stain cells with at least viability dye, anti-CD45, anti-EpCAM, and
anti-CD31.

The aim is to have 1 E6 cells per sample.

- Wash cells once with 900 µl FACS buffer (centifuge 6min 400 g at
 > +4°C).

- Dilute antibodies in Brilliant stain buffer (#563794 BD Horizon),
 > add 50 µl of the antibody mix to cells, incubate 30 min at +4°C
 > shielded from light.

- After incubation, wash once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

- Fix cells by adding 200 µl IC Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen)
 > and incubate for 40 min at +4°C shielded from light.

- After incubation, add 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, incubate 5
 > min at +4°C.

- Centrifuge, wash pelled with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer and
 > resuspend in 900 µl FACS buffer for overnight storage.

- Next day, centrifuge, dilute intracellular antibody in
 > Permeabilization buffer, and resuspend pellet into 50 µl
 > antibody mix. Incubate 30 min at +4°C shielded from light.

- Wash once with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer and resuspend in 400
 > µl FACS buffer.

- Pipeted the cell suspension through 5 ml Falcon polystyrene tube
 > with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Prepare compensation controls

- Add one drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG,

ll suspension through 5 ml Falcon polystyrene tube
 > with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Prepare compensation controls

- Add one drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG,
 > #51-90-9001229) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control
 > #51-90-9001291) compensation beads to 5ml Falcon polystyrene round
 > bottom tubes (white cap).

- For stained compensation controls, 2 µl of each antibody

- Incubate atleast 30 min at +4°C shielded from light, and resuspend
 > to 350 µl FACS buffer.

Analyze the samples to determine the percentage of fibroblasts (CD45-
EpCAM- CD31- cells).
